ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Delta, Northeast) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_sq_miles" TEXT /* Total area of the region in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area (e.g., Metropolitan, Nonmetropolitan) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the area is located */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the area */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities in the area (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which data is recorded */,
  "pct_with_computing_device" REAL /* Percentage of households with at least one computing device */,
  "median_household_income" TEXT /* Median household income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "internet_access" REAL /* Percentage of households with internet access */,
  "broadband_access" REAL /* Percentage of households with broadband internet access */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical access level (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for data analyst, 3 for researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range defining the income bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "lower_bound" TEXT /* Lower bound of the income range */,
  "upper_bound" TEXT /* Upper bound of the income range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_levels" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty level */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate percentage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poverty level */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the poverty rate range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the poverty rate range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computing_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of computing device (e.g., desktop, laptop, tablet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the computing device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the computing device */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year when the device was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry associated */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device was accessed */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device when accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES computing_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry associated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the data */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_status_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_status_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the project */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "grant_id" TEXT /* ID of the grant or funding source */,
  "co_leaders" TEXT /* IDs of co-leaders of the project (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project data entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household data entry used in the project */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the project (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES household_data ("data_id")
)
